subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Communication Failures
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Communication Failures.

hook.text: A surgeon removes the wrong kidney. The chart said left. The patient said right. Nobody clarified.

buildup.text: Communication failures contribute to over 70% of serious workplace incidents.

discovery.text: Ambiguous instructions, language barriers, and assumed knowledge create deadly gaps.

twist.text: The aviation industry solved this with standardized communication—read-back and verify protocols.

climax.text: Healthcare adopted aviation's checklist approach, reducing surgical errors dramatically.

punchline.text: Say it. Hear it back. Confirm it. Three steps that prevent disasters.

quiz.question: What percentage of serious workplace incidents involve communication failures?
